data.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Sees Humanoid Robots In Factories In Less Than 5 Years: 'I Think It's Pretty Good Economics'
data.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang has projected the widespread deployment of humanoid robots in manufacturing units in the next five years.

data.title: Why Five Below Shares Are Trading Higher By 12%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
US Stocks Likely To Open Higher As Fed Says Tariff-Induced Inflation Will Be 'Transitory:' Any Pullback In Equities 'Offers An Opportunity,' Says Expert
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Thursday following the Federal Open Market Committee's decision on Wednesday calling inflation 'transitory'.

data.title: Tesla Expelled From Vancouver Auto Show Amid Security Concerns After Failing To 'Voluntarily Withdraw'
data.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) has been expelled from the Vancouver International Auto Show by authorities due to safety concerns.

data.title: Pebble Founder Echoes Mark Zuckerberg's Concerns, Slams Apple For Making It 'Nearly Impossible' To Build Smartwatches That Work With iPhone
